name: Laika, The Immortal Rider
description:
You know, I check around the site for a Laika Character and the only one I found were her mother, and her deceased form, Aka Ghost. So, I want to fix that and make an actual character of this Coyote mother. Meet Laika, a coyote mother to now her only daughter left that is Puppy. She comes from a long line of coyote women who are technically are immortal/cursed because of their bloodline.

A skilled motorist and marksman that is fighting against the Avian regime that is based in the actual game. I heard this game is a really good game if you enjoy Metroidvania style of games and the stories is very compelling and yet dark. I'd recommend playing the game and understand more of how everything goes.

Listen, a MILF is a MILF, and she still has that Mommy energy somewhere.
creator: 2themax
